items.headline: India’s Capital Markets Open Wider to Foreign Listings
items.summary: SEBI’s latest framework enables companies to list on IFSC exchanges, unlocking deeper institutional demand with regulatory continuity.
items.takeaway1: Strategy: Dual‑path financing hedges valuation cycles.
items.takeaway2: Corporate Finance: Lower WACC via diversified investor base.

items.headline: Tech majors race for on‑device AI
items.summary: Chip + model co‑design shrinks latency; expect new pricing tiers and sticky ecosystems.
items.takeaway1: Pricing power concentrates where switching costs rise.

items.headline: Credit growth outpaces deposit growth
items.summary: Banks chase yields; deposit repricing lags. NIMs face pressure as competition intensifies.
items.takeaway1: Watch ALM risk and funding mix discipline.

items.headline: Logistics startups pivot to profitability
items.summary: Dynamic routing and 3PL network sharing lift unit economics; volumes move to contracts.
items.takeaway1: Gross margin lifts when drop density rises.

items.headline: Consumer brands test direct‑to‑retailer playbooks
items.summary: Big FMCG pilots bypass wholesale layers to co‑own shopper data with modern trade.
items.takeaway1: Own the data, own the margin.

items.headline: Auto OEMs build captive finance for EV adoption
items.summary: Innovative bundles—battery warranties, subs, buy‑back guarantees—unlock lower TCO.
items.takeaway1: Financing is a product, not a feature.

items.headline: Hotels monetize late‑checkout as micro‑subscription
items.summary: Yield management extends beyond rooms to time‑based add‑ons; ancillary revenue grows.
items.takeaway1: Price the customer’s time, not just the room.

items.headline: Supply Chain Control Towers
items.summary: Near‑shoring reshapes EOQs; multi‑node visibility releases 8–12% working capital.

items.headline: Porter’s Five Forces — Regional Food Delivery
items.summary: A Tier‑2 entrant avoids dinner wars by bundling lunchtime grocery combos.
items.takeaway1: Compete on configuration, not just category.

items.headline: Strategy is the lever that turns constraints into advantages.

items.summary: YoY operating margin for top‑quartile SaaS after usage‑based pricing (illustrative).
